name: socibook-skillset
description: Academic monograph writing toolkit with 10 skills for planning and drafting book-length scholarly works, grounded in genre analysis of 22 political sociology and American politics monographs. Skills: architecture (book-architecture), chapter writing (book-introduction, book-theory-chapter, book-context-chapter, book-parallel-case, book-cross-issue, book-quant-chapter, book-conclusion), and revision support (book-editor, book-continuity).
